sourcebooks: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide

taxonomyCorrections.name: Fast Surge
taxonomyCorrections.reason: No Force prerequisite and benefit is Second Wind action economy; current source context supports general/resource classification, not Force feat classification.

outOfScope.reason: Force Regimen Mastery may grant regimen picks, but individual regimen text/effects need their own source pass and picker/card data.
Republic/Sith Military Training, Conditioning, and Unswerving Resolve need combat/result/reaction contexts before full automation.
Withdrawal Strike and Relentless Attack need persistent weapon choice and tactical context before full roll enforcement.

recommendedNextWork: Implement or harden attack option cards for Critical Strike, Improved Rapid Strike, Mandalorian Training, and selected KOTOR melee/ranged options.
Add poison defense hook so Poison Resistance and Bio-Stabilizer Implant share a single poison-immunity/resistance path.
Create source-reviewed Force Regimen entries before expanding Force Regimen Mastery beyond entitlement/picker metadata.
Build a reaction/result hook backlog for Conditioning, Republic Military Training, Sith Military Training, and Unswerving Resolve.
